case_title: FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK VS. MARK S STOUT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MATT STNONS FILED RE: JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT BY COUT FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY (CLAIM AND DELIVERY JUDGMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-20-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT STOUT, MARK S DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-20-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-16-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-05-2004
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED OCT-27-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOUT, MARK S
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT STOUT, MARK S
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT STOUT, MARK S

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOUT, MARK S POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1)1 DT COMPUTER, MODEL NO. CPQ6370US; (2)1 COMPUTER MONITOR, MODEL NO CPQFP7020;, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT , 3)1 PERSONAL DATA, MODEL NO. PLNM133N1; (4)1 DIGITAL CAMERA, MODEL NO. CANELPHS200 AND (5)1 ELECTRONIC GAME MODEL NO. SON97001.
